title: Baker Ross FE348 Hairy Stretchy Swing Balls - Pack of 4, Squeezy Toys for Kids Party Favours, Small Gifts for Children
features: Fun Designs: Kids will love bouncing, squeezing and playing with these colourful yo yo toys. Each toy is decorated with colourful noodles that will wiggle and dance
Versatile Party Favor: Whether indoors, outdoors, or at your next party, these yo yos are sure to keep kids entertained.

Perfect for Children: Ideal for kids' birthday party favors, Halloween treats, pocket money toys, small gifts, or as rewards for good behavior! Let the fun and games begin with these delightful bounce toys!
Included in the Pack: This pack contains 4 toys
Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing arts and crafts supplies for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: Colourful swing balls covered in soft rubber hairs! 4 bright neon colours. Size 14cm. Age 3+. Baker Ross is a family owned and run business creating innovative arts, craft projects for kids and party favour products. Designed in the United Kingdom - Baker Ross: inspiring creativity.
